rulings.Case Title: MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP, INC. VS. ERICA SNYDER ET AL

rulings.Case Title: OCEAN AVENUE REAL ESTATE FUND, LLC VS. CATHERINE HERRERA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of And Motion For Reconsideration Of Denial For Relief From Admissions; Declaration Of Catherine Herrera; Exhibits
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday July 23, 2018 line 6. DEFENDANT CATHERINE HERRERA Notice Of And Motion For Reconsideration Of Denial For Relief From Admissions; Declaration Of Catherine Herrera DENIED. The Court lacks jurisdiction to entertain this motion. Judgment was entered on July 10, 2018. Even if the Court had jurisdiction the motion would be denied. The motion was not timely filed. The last day to file was June 6, 2018 and there are no new fact, law or circumstances. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JENNIFER SIOSON VS. SHARON FERNALD ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday July 23, 2018 line 7. DEFENDANT SHARON FERNALD, JESSE DAVIS Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons GRANTED, subject to opposition. July 10, 2018 service is quashed. = (501/REQ)
